name: Verify creating a student with partial fields returns error

assert 500 == 422

students_flows = <workflows.api.students_api_flows.StudentsApiFlows object at 0x0000025FF09C5160>

    @allure.title("Verify creating a student with partial fields returns error")
    def test_create_student_partial_fields_error(students_flows: StudentsApiFlows):
        partial_payload = {
            "firstName": "Tome",
            "email": "tome.partial@example.com"
        }
    
        response = students_flows.api.post(STUDENTS_BASE_URL, payload=partial_payload)
    
        # אם השדות חלקיים, הסטטוס הצפוי צריך להיות 400 או 422
        expected_status = 422
        actual_status = response.status
        print(f"Expected status: {expected_status}, Actual status: {actual_status}")
>       assert actual_status == expected_status, f"Status code mismatch! Expected {expected_status}, got {actual_status}"
